description: Generate a theoretical fragment-ion spectrum (b/y, optionally a/c/x/z and neutral losses) for a peptide using TheoreticalSpectrumGenerator. Writes the spectrum to mzML and an annotated peak list CSV.
rules: writes theoretical_peaks.csv and theoretical.mzML under record_store
IONS is a space-separated subset of a b c x y z (default b y)
LOSSES=1 includes neutral losses; PRECURSOR=1 includes precursor peaks
usage: Set PEPTIDE (OpenMS mod syntax allowed). Optional CHARGE, IONS (space-separated), LOSSES=1, PRECURSOR=1. Output: theoretical_peaks.csv (+ theoretical.mzML).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates theoretical_peaks.csv and records the reason.
